A

AccessEvent - Class in com.example.glitch.model
Represents an immutable audit event for gate activity.

Creates an immutable access event used by audit screens.

Represents the dashboard-level state ribbon and protocol information.

EntryRequest - Class in com.example.glitch.model
Represents one active or exited entry request shown on the guard dashboard.

Maps Firestore document data into an AccessEvent.

Converts Firestore map data into a strongly typed entry request.

Maps Firestore data into a GuestPass.

Maps Firestore document data into a SecurityAlert.

Maps Firestore data into a user profile.

Maps Firestore data into a VehicleRequestRecord.

Converts Firestore map data into a dashboard state object.
